questionHtml:
Which factors could cause emphysema?

I. Air pollution

II. Genetic predisposition

III. Tobacco smoke

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: Which factors could cause emphysema? I. Air pollution II. Genetic predisposition III. Tobacco smoke A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
